name: Rainbow Stuffed Peppers
recipeIngredient: 4 small (to medium) Bell peppers, divided into colors: red, green, yellow, and orange
1 can (16 oz.) ROSARITA no-fat refried beans
1 can (8.5 oz.) Whole kernel corn, drained
3/4 cup ROSARITA green tomatillo salsa - medium
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bell peppers in half from the top of the stem to the bottom; discard seeds and membranes.
2. In a large pot of boiling water, blanch peppers for 3 minutes; invert them to drain.
3. In a medium skillet, brown the ground turkey with onions until cooked through.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (beans, corn, salsa, rice, parsley, garlic powder, chili powder, cumin, and salt) to the skillet. Simmer until the mixture is hot and bubbly.
5. Place the peppers in a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish; stuff them with the bean mixture.
6. Cover the dish and bake at 350 degrees F for 35 to 40 minutes.
7. Serve with additional salsa. Makes 4 to 8 servings.
